description_long: This is a dark blue metal kettle with a glossy finish, featuring a wide, cylindrical body and a slightly domed, removable lid topped with a small, faceted knob. The kettle has a prominent, arched black handle attached at two points on the top, allowing for easy carrying and pouring. A long, curved spout extends from one side, designed for controlled pouring of hot liquids. On the body, there is a gold geometric decorative pattern resembling an interlocking triquetra, adding a touch of elegance to its utilitarian form. The base of the kettle is flat, providing stability when placed on surfaces. The overall design is both functional and visually appealing, suitable for use in kitchens, cafes, or urban outdoor settings.
description: A glossy dark blue metal kettle with a black arched handle, gold geometric pattern, and a curved spout. It features a domed lid with a knob and a flat stable base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout on the left, the arched handle, domed lid with knob, and the gold geometric pattern on the body.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the kettle, the handle's attachment points, and the absence of the spout and decorative pattern.
description_view_2: Front-right view with the spout clearly visible on the right, the handle, lid, and the gold geometric pattern prominently displayed.
description_view_3: Rear-left view showing the handle, lid, and a partial glimpse of the gold pattern, with the spout mostly hidden.
